General.Name: Alibaba Pictures Group Ltd
General.Description: Damai Entertainment Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates in the content, technology, and IP merchandising and commercialization businesses in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. The company invests, produces, promotes, markets, and distributes entertainment contents comprising film, online drama series, and broadcasting and television programs, as well as short dramas for children; and operates film ticketing and technology platforms under Tao Piao Piao and Yunzhi names, as well as Beacon AI, a data product which provide intelligent promotion and distribution services for the entertainment industry. It also engages in the provision of digital collectibles issuance and factoring services; establishment of platforms; and engages in the life cycle of live performances, such as performances ticketing, on-site event services, ticketing issuance systems, and venue operations to the organization, as well as investment, production, and promotion of the performance contents. In addition, the company provides investment management and consultation services; invests in production and distribution of film and television copyrights; technological consultation, and technology transfer and services; technical promotion services; exchanging and planning services for screen-based, cultural, and art events; performance brokerage; and engages in the design, production, agency sale, and release of advertisements. Further, it offers advertising and sale of entertainment related merchandise and derivative products; computer system services; supplies cinema ticketing and connecting software systems; and provides talent agency, software design and development, IP related products; and sells pop toys and action figures. The company was formerly known as Alibaba Pictures Group Limited. The company was incorporated in 1994 and is headquartered in Beijing, China. Damai Entertainment Holdings Limited operates as a subsidiary of Ali CV Investment Holding Limited.
General.Address: Zone B,Alibaba Beijing Chaoyang, Beijing, China
